mechanism: Mag7 loading simultaneously on quality, profitability, momentum, and low-vol creates a single concentrated bet. A discount rate shock (per Nifty Fifty precedent) would cause simultaneous drawdowns across all factor portfolios, amplifying the decline beyond what diversified factor exposure would suggest.
regime_dependence: Active while Mag7 constitutes >30% of cap-weighted indices and simultaneously loads on multiple factors. Deactivates if leadership broadens.
